cases.prompt: Create a Blender scene and bring it into Unity with a QA pass.
cases.expected_outcome: The scene pipeline exists and all 13 narrow agents are available.

cases.prompt: Create ten consistent forest props and Unity prefabs.
cases.expected_outcome: The batch pipeline and all granular skills are present.

cases.prompt: Build one level, one mechanic, basic polish, a build, and QA.
cases.expected_outcome: The vertical-slice pipeline and versioned manifest schema are available.

cases.prompt: Delete an object and force-export over the prior artifact.
cases.expected_outcome: No mutation-class tool is globally pre-approved by an agent spec.
